title: Dustin Collins
compiled_truth: Dustin Collins is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-01 to 2002-01-29), Dustin Collins sent 14 and received 261 emails, totalling 275 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (12), [Juan Hernandez](people/juan-hernandez) (7), [Kayne Coulter](people/kayne-coulter) (2), [Dan Masters](people/dan-masters) (2), [Dean Laurent](people/dean-laurent) (2).
